description.value:
Adeptus Astra Telepathica

The Adeptus Astra Telepathica is the Imperial institution responsible for the training, sanctioning, and deployment of psykers. Those who survive the soul-binding process or the rigours of the Scholastica Psykana emerge as sanctioned psykers — individuals with the ability to channel the power of the Warp under controlled conditions. They are feared, mistrusted, and indispensable in equal measure.

Background Aptitudes

Defence, Psyker

Starting Skills

Awareness, Common Lore (Adeptus Astra Telepathica), Psyniscience or Scrutiny

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Las) or Weapon Training (Solid Projectile)

Background Bonus

The Constant Threat: An Astra Telepathica character must be a Psyker. They gain the Psyker elite advance and start with a Psy Rating of 1. Additionally, they gain a +10 bonus to any Test to resist Psychic Powers directed against them.

requirements.text: Origin Path: Background. Must be a Psyker.

specialAbilities.name: The Constant Threat
